news.paragraph: Mastercard has secured a partnership to power Amazon's newly launched Prime Business and Amazon Business credit cards. While geopolitical scrutiny regarding payment systems in Brazil may present macro headwinds, the expansion into Amazon's business credit ecosystem is a key recent development.
headlines: Brazil's beloved instant payment system faces scrutiny from the Trump administration
XRP ETFs See Biggest Inflows Since January
Trump Has Landed in China—See Which CEOs Are There With Him
Amazon.com Launches New Prime Business, Business Credit Cards
Amazon's New Prime Business and Amazon Business Credit Cards, Powered by U.S. Bank and Mastercard®, Are Now Available with Enhanced Rewards and Flexible Financing
The Zacks Analyst Blog  NVIDIA, Mastercard, AbbVie, Waterstone and Precipio
